assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18-20: '## Code Intelligence' section states 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and provides concrete examples using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol and mcp__serena_ui__get_symbols_overview

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 36: '### Limitations' subheading appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), making it a subsection of Code Intelligence. Content: 'No limitations known -- no Serena instance limitations reported.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 9: 'Two Serena instances were identified from the MCP tool listing by scanning for the `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern:' followed by entries for '1. **serena_backend**' (line 11) and '2. **serena_ui**' (line 13)

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 3-9 show a 'Preserved (existing content)' section listing 3 preserved sections: '# my-project', '## Documentation', and '## Getting Started'. This indicates existing content was preserved, contradicting the assertion that this is a greenfield setup with all sections newly added. The Project Configuration sections were added as new content (lines 11-19), but the document explicitly states some content was preserved.
